title: trisetum aeneum
intro: Trisetum aeneum, also known as copper oat grass, is a perennial grass species native to the mountainous regions of the world. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Trisetum aeneum include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Trisetum aeneum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
